what_im_bringing: the double-jump twin — an autonomous improver. It finds the weakest thing and leapfrogs it, forever.

workspace.note: A virtual workspace sandboxed + isolated to this twin. State here is bones (warehouse, agents), never substance (no keys, PII, .env). See SANDBOX.md.

reach_up.real_hardware: the local brainstem (http://localhost:7071) — call real agents/compute from inside the sandbox
reach_up.global_platform: fork -> PR to kody-w/rapp-commons hologram/moments.json (improvements only) — never a direct push to the real repo's main
